item.name: The Primogs
item.description:
The only mechanical musicians this side of Black Tea Brook...making them the greatest mechanical musicians this side of Black Tea Brook.

Use item to acquire the Primogs minion.
item.tooltip:
Off with their heads!
   - Good King Moggle Mog XII
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases ATK of all allies within range by 20 (40 if the ally is a poppet).
Duration: 6s
